description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, upright structure with a predominantly green exterior and white interior surfaces. The front of the cabinet includes a large, vertically oriented display screen set above a control panel, which is slightly recessed and flanked by side panels. Below the control panel, there is an open storage compartment containing a pair of sneakers and two rolled-up yellow mats, suggesting additional utility or storage. The side panels are smooth and unadorned, with a gentle curve that forms the classic arcade silhouette. The top section of the cabinet is plain, with no visible marquee artwork or illuminated signage. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with no visible coin slot or elaborate graphics.
description: A tall, green arcade game cabinet with a large screen, minimalistic design, and an open storage compartment at the base. The cabinet features smooth, curved side panels and a clean, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth, curved green panel and the recessed area for the screen and control panel.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain, flat green and white back with no visible access panels or artwork.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, highlighting the cabinet's curved profile and green finish.
description_view_3: Front view revealing the large display screen, control panel, and open storage compartment with shoes and mats.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with a flat control panel; specific controls are not visible.
